gist.headline: Daily Chronicle
gist.blurb: The hive's daily automated scroll update.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README's Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: Robot monitor updating a bulletin board while the bee watches.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a new paper to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
